operator: Teusajaure cabin host (STF) or County Administrative Board rowboats
how_it_works: ~1km by boat/rowboat. From far shore: raise the flag/container to signal the host; add 15 min to times below.

season.note: 13 Sep: cabins close midday -- afternoon departures cancelled, morning is last crossing.
season.weather_note: Cancelled in severe weather or unsuitable water levels.

booking: Not required. Arranged with the cabin host or via the flag/container signal.

sources.note: No separate operator site (unlike Langas/Sitojaure/Aktse) -- run by the Teusajaure host/County rowboats. This STF page is the primary source.
